name: R5CodeableConceptElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 CodeableConcept to FHIR R4 CodeableConcept
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 CodeableConcept to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `CodeableConcept.coding` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeableConcept.coding` as `Equivalent`.
Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true.

Element `CodeableConcept.coding` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeableConcept.coding` as `Equivalent`.
Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information.  Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true.

Element `CodeableConcept.text` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeableConcept.text` as `Equivalent`.
Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings.

Element `CodeableConcept.text` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeableConcept.text` as `Equivalent`.
Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings.
